originalTitle: Spider-Man Brand New Day Update + Doomsday News! | Sneak Peek
content: Spider-Man Brand New Trailer coming this week? Welcome back to New Rockstars’ Sneak Peek! This week, Erik Voss and Jessica Clemons get a preview of the upcoming trailer with major plot details revealed by Empire Magazine! Plus… will Tobey Maguire be in Avengers Doomsday? And what’s with the casting of all these damn kids in Doomsday? Join us at IGN Live on June 7 for our LIVE RECORDING of our upcoming Civil War episode! Get $10 off using the code NEWROCKSTARS10 here: https://events.leapevents.com/tickets/ign-live-2026 NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK youtube.com/@WitchingHourNR youtube.com/@BreakroomNR youtube.com/@DeepDiveNR youtube.com/@HighlightsNR Join the NR Underground for exclusive audio shows: https://nrunderground.supercast.com Check out our merch! http://www.NerdRiot.shop Follow us on Spotify to get updates when we release new music: https://open.spotify.com/artist/00FXqz5AkEpUTJ1aAPj0TA CHAPTERS 00:00 - Intro 02:42 - New Quotes for BND 07:03 - Toby in Doomsday? 19:27 - A LOT of Young Actors cast in Doomsday 32:49 - Coming to NRS 34:50 - What We’re Watching EXECUTIVE PRODUCERS Michael Horwitz TDS on a Quest Dante Justin Schoenrock Bro... Paulo Bianca Rick Denmon Jeremy Dunham Frederick Price This video was edited using the Adobe Creative Suite. To subscribe and help our channel, use our link: https://adobe.prf.hn/click/camref:1011l3NRam/creativeref:1011l134937 Follow New Rockstars​: TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@newrockstars_official Instagram: ​https://instagram.com/newrockstars Facebook: ​https://facebook.com/newmediarockstars Twitter: ​https://twitter.com/newrockstars Written by: Erik Voss Head of Content & Executive Producer: Erik Voss General Manager: Zach Huddleston Senior Producer: Jessica Clemons Producers: Gina Ippolito, Alex Berg, Patti Chambers Podcast Producer: Brian M Kim Post Production Supervisor: Joshua Steven Hurd Staff Editor: Abby Freel Editors: Eric Gorday For business inquiries please contact business@nrdigitalstudios.com
chineseSummary: 新摇滚明星 · 43,256 次观看
chineseContent: 蜘蛛侠全新预告片本周上映？欢迎回到新摇滚明星先睹为快！本周，埃里克·沃斯 (Erik Voss) 和杰西卡·克莱蒙斯 (Jessica Clemons) 预览了即将上映的预告片，其中包含《帝国》杂志透露的主要情节细节！另外……托比·马奎尔会出现在《复仇者联盟末日》中吗？世界末日中所有这些该死的孩子的选角是怎么回事？欢迎参加 6 月 7 日的 IGN Live，现场录制即将播出的内战剧集！使用代码 NEWROCKSTARS10 可获得 10 美元折扣：https://events.leapevents.com/tickets/ign-live-2026 NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK youtube.com/@WitchingHourNR youtube.com/@BreakroomNR youtube.com/@DeepDiveNR youtube.com/@HighlightsNR 加入 NR Underground 观看独家音频节目：https://nrunderground.supercast.com 查看我们的商品！ http://www.NerdRiot.shop 在 Spotify 上关注我们，以便在我们发布新音乐时获取更新： https://open.spotify.com/artist/00FXqz5AkEpUTJ1aAPj0TA 章节 00:00 - 介绍 02:42 - BND 的新报价 07:03 - 托比在世界末日？ 19:27 - 很多年轻演员在《世界末日》中出演 32:49 - 即将加入 NRS 34:50 - 我们在看什么 执行制片人 Michael Horwitz TDS 参与 Quest Dante Justin Schoenrock 兄弟... Paulo Bianca Rick Denmon Jeremy Dunham Frederick Price 该视频是使用 Adob​​e Creative Suite 编辑的。要订阅并帮助我们的频道，请使用我们的链接：https://adobe.prf.hn/click/camref:1011l3NRam/creativeref:1011l134937 关注新摇滚明星​：TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@newrockstars_official Instagram：​https://instagram.com/newrockstars Facebook：​https://facebook.com/newmediarockstars Twitter： https://twitter.com/newrockstars 作者：Erik Voss 内容主管兼执行制片人：Erik Voss 总经理：Zach Huddleston 高级制片人：Jessica Clemons 制片人：Gina Ippolito、Alex Berg、Patti Chambers 播客产品
